workspacePath.description: Path to the OODA workspace directory containing KNOWLEDGE.json and PRIORITIES.json

enabled.description: Enable the OODA chain. Default: true

notifyPendingProposals.description: Inject pending proposal count into agent preamble. Default: true

debugMode.description: Show OODA summary in TUI/chat replies. off=silent, inline=one-line, verbose=inline+council trace

tickEnabled.description: Enable the research_tick DMN work unit. Default: false

sandboxEnabled.description: Allow Stage 3 sandbox via git-worktree isolation. Default: false

repoRoot.description: Repo root for git worktree add. Defaults to process.cwd()

baseRef.description: Git ref to base worktrees on. Default: HEAD

evalCommand.description: Eval command run inside the worktree. Default: pnpm tsgo --noEmit
